item.title: It's yet another unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i thought her purse was a burger
mmm hmm
well done whoever the artist is
wow
absolute falsehood
i'm impressed tbh
all the cool kids are doing it
this looks oddly like JP1
this was not necessary
i need a hamster wheel but human sized
good to know
i'm calling the police
dang
accurate
i did not censor that 'fuck' i swear
frog
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Why do they get to be happy?
item.dc:creator: WeirdAlisMySpiritUserName

item.title: Sad
item.description: They interrogated me. Like 7 cops and detectives like I murdered him. Just as soon as they got there. I almost passed out from shock and they were mostly assholes. And then the one cop that stayed behind to wait for summer funeral to come get him gave me Steve's driver's license back and said, "Don't commit any Medicare fraud." I said, "too soon much?" It was fucked up! I'm sitting here without him. And I'm lost. And I'm pissed off and sad.
item.dc:creator: tokerator

item.title: Going to visit Nanny and Pop Pop
item.description: She's the cutest.
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Cake Day? In freaking Pride? Fuck yea!
item.description:
Hello there, my name is Lara and today's my cake day. I don't have any cake to show off, but I've got a bunch of pride pictures I've shot over the years.
It's mostly kisses, flags and happiness in a world that's increasing in hate and bigotry. But we're here still.
You know, I love our resilience as a community. I hate that we have a need to be resilient, but… at least some of us are still here.
This is a month for celebration and remembrance. Celebration for those of us still living the life and remembrance for all those people that we left behind and that we miss so much.
We're queer, we're here, and we've got hip pain — moderately severe.
Let's fly our flags.
Anyway, this is me. A forty-two-year-old woman with a bunch of things to get over. I've got a nice, nice portfolio over at https://prints.larasantaella.es/albums/featured in case any of you want to buy a print or something? Anything would be greatly appreciated because these last three months have been wild.
item.dc:creator: angrytransgirl

item.title: Gonna give it my best
item.description: I am genuinely touched by the overwhelming support from the Imgur community. Your encouraging comments have given me a newfound strength and confidence in my abilities, regardless of my candidacy's strength. I never imagined this would go viral, and I am profoundly moved by the kindness from people I've never met. Thank you all for your positivity and support. Fingers crossed!!
item.dc:creator: JoeLouieP

item.title: Some Monday Programming Humor For a Niche Audience (to help you jump-start the week)
item.description:
1. Guess we found Elon's alternative twitter account
2. She is back with more wisdom
3. As someone who used to bang the ENTER so hard, I approve of this
4. Yap, yap, yap
5
6. Some ancient wisdom for you all
7
8. How to give the entire IT department a heart attack
9
10. CTRL + C, CTRL + V
11
12
13. Project Managers be like
14
15. And finally I would like to share a young picture of @OP. Yap, this was me, just a rugged jacked nerd who loved video games. Now all grown up, I'm making games of my own, and my "A.I." algorithm has calculated that there is 95.413% chance that if you liked the humor of this dump, you will like the game too. So anyway, please wishlist, it helps small devs a lot : ) https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Happy week, ma dudes!

item.title: A journey…….
item.description:
So. This has been a journey and with all the love and support, y’all should definitely see the end result………
Everything piled up. Took me 9 days to leave toxicity and bootstrap a new place for my kids and myself.
After. Busted my butt and I don’t think I’ve ever been so exhausted but nothings ever been more worth it.
❤️
The Nook. If you know, you know.
The kids room. Gave them the Master and now they call it The Master apartment, lol. Just glad they have the walk-in closet for all their frigging toys, lol.
Relaxing after 10 days of the hardest grind I’ve ever experienced. Ready to struggle, grind it out and make a life for myself and my kids. This community has been spectacular. Being open and honest about hard times and receiving support matters. It’s hard to open up but for anyone struggling, please please please reach out; there ARE people who care. Even if they’re weirdo Imgurians. Thanks everybody. I’m going to be just fine. ❤️ Edit- Since people have asked, my Cashapp is $CeciliaEvans333. I’m pretty well furnished but yeah, some of you know what it’s like with kids and every little bit helps. Thanks, guys.
item.dc:creator: Momster33

item.title: Remember Team Fortress 2?
item.description: I don't care if this gets lost in usersub or gets downvoted to hell. if even one person sees this, it's a win for me. I'll try to keep this brief, but just like the image says, Team Fortress 2, one of the most popular PC games of all time, published by Valve, has been suffering for more than half a decade. Casual matchmaking has been overrun by bots that use aim hacks and spam filth, profanity, and ear rape over voice chat and in text chat. The hosters of these bots have actually doxxed some human players, and in one case even sent police to one if TF2's more popular content creators via a falsified bomb threat. 2 years ago, the TF2 community put together an event called SaveTF2, where we showed our ongoing love for a game that, then, was nearing 15 years old. The Valve team responded, but did next to nothing to fix the ongoing bot issue. Today, the gaming community is trying again. There is a petition up right now at save.tf that has just recently hit over 100k signatures. Our plan is to physically print the names of these petitioners and send the papers to Valve in the same way World of Warcraft players did when they organized a protest of their own regarding their ignored pleas for some a legacy update. Look, the point is, we need as many voices as we can to be heard by Valve, because even though Team Fortress 2 is now 17 years old, it still has a dedicated community. And this community is done seeing its beloved game in such an unplayable state, while Valve continues to add seasonal microtransactions and cosmetics to it. Upvote me, downvote me, ignore me completely. I really don't care. But I am sickened by how Valve has treated their most popular game, and today is the day Team Fortress 2's playerbase says, "enough is enough." Thanks for reading. tl;dr Team Fortress 2 is being ignored by its publisher, Valve, even after 5+ years of cheating, vulgar bots. Theres a petition and Twitter movement happening. join, or don't.
item.dc:creator: randomkeyboardsmash

item.title: A super group I was not aware of
item.description: Oof Tatata is the name of Jason's band Jason Momoa plays bass and guitar, has acquired some dream instruments and even got to jam with some of his heroes. But he's never been in a band or played a gig before. That all changed last night with the debut performance by his new trio called Oof Tatata (Momoa applied to trademark the name on 9 April). We say new, but the three musicians involved go way back. "I've known Kenny Dale and Mike Hayes for about 20 years and these guys taught me how to play music," said the Game Of Thrones alumni introducing the trio's set at the New Zealand wrap party at the end of filming for the long-awaited Minecraft film. "But I never wanted to play in a band, but now times have changed so this is the first show." He picked a great occasion for the debut gig because fellow Minecraft castmates Danielle Brookes, and Jack Black (alongside Rita Ora) were on hand to help out – the latter two duetting on a celebratory take on Stevie Nicks' classic Edge OF Seventeen with Momoa on Fender Precision Bass, Hayes on Buddy Guy Strat and Dale on drums. https://www.musicradar.com/news/twenty-years-in-the-making-jason-momoa-performs-his-first-ever-live-show-as-a-bassist-covering-black-sabbath-hendrix-zeppelin-metallica-and-stevie-nicks-with-jack-black-danielle-brooks-and-rita-ora-joining-as-guests
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.dc:creator: mikochen2005

item.title: Look at this unrepentant whore
item.description:
Update to this post: https://imgur.com/gallery/Tlxwb0T I did everything right. I took her to the vet within 3 days of finding her and they assured me she was not pregnant and hadnt even had her first heat, as she was only about 3 months old.
She'd been getting kinda fat but i chalked it up to not living in the bushes/being fed regularly and growing normally. I even patted her belly several times and affectionately fat-shamed her.
Yesterday she went missing and we tore the house apart searching. Hours later we find her wedged under an extremely low bed. Blood and slime everywhere...and four crying kittens. She's not even sorry. Look at her.
Check out this adorable pile of vet bills, everyone! We already had six cats and now we have 10 I guess. Fuck. Before you come for me, know that I have worked and volunteered in rescue for YEARS. I am not someone whose animals have "oops" litters. The vet literally "verified" that she hadn't been in heat and we made her spay appointment for July. This was a huge shock and while I've had moments of anger at what a shite job they did at the vet, the little fuckers actually are completely adorable. Goddammit. Anyway, they're about 24 hours old now. Fun times ahead.
item.dc:creator: lotsofthingsinplaces

item.title: I just want to feel safe
item.description: He’s started talking in nonsense words when I try to have a conversation, I think he’s gone off the deep end. He won’t admit he needs more help than I can give and he won’t move out. Do I need to leave my home? Edit: thank you for your questions, jokes, and support! I needed to say this to strangers bc I’m too embarrassed to get most of my friends involved. I have a few close ones I can turn to. Secured a place to stay. I really appreciate everyone, even the critical ones. Explaining helps me talk it through. Be excellent to each other.
item.dc:creator: toobiwanyoulisten
